items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the expected outcome of the persona scenario. While the expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a clear failure report, there are no traces or snapshots captured as required. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the persona scenario.
